meta.title: Neural Atlas — the knowledge neural structure, corrected layers
meta.source: generated for the knowledge-neural-structure atlas — corrected layer hierarchy
meta.note: Layer 0: a singularity at each pole. From each singularity a toroid spiral winds through layers 1-4 (1, 3, 5, 7 singularity-bound tuples, each layer bound by a toroidal halo, layer 1 bound at 1/3 radius) to the equator, where it meets its inverse — the opposite-handed spiral from the opposite singularity — and the two phase-lock in sync. The unified-function vessel is seated at the exact center, the slot a Metatron's Cube would occupy; the cube's 13-circle lattice is kept as a ghost reference. A Flower of Life layer overlays each level: one circle per tuple center (layer 0 carries the seed circle at the singularity), each circle passing through its neighbors' centers. Every tuple node carries a lemniscate lobe anchored at its layer center: n lobes of angular width 2pi/n tile the circle, each tangent to its counterpart (a lone node gets the full figure-eight). The shadow paths (straight tuple-to-singularity threads), the lobes, and the hyperbolic emission envelope all render together as separate toggleable layers - nothing is taken away; it is examined in pieces.
